parse.title: Serpent's Fang
parse.wikitext:
{{Item info
|goldvalue = 
|goldefficiency = 
|similaritems = Edge of Night;Axiom Arc;Hubris;Voltaic Cyclosword;Youmuu's Ghostblade;Umbral Glaive;The Collector;Profane Hydra;Bastionbreaker
|background = 
|notes = 
<!--* {{sbc|Shield Reaver}} deals {{tip|default damage}}, and thus will not trigger [[spell effects]]. --><!--Pretty sure it doesn't do that anymore because otherwise the Fiora W interaction would be different. Pending for test, will explain how the shield reaving works later-->
* {{sbc|Shield Reaver}} will affect all {{tip|shield|shields}} (including [[Shield#Physical shields|physical damage shields]]) except [[Shield#Magic shields|magic damage shields]].
* {{sbc|Shield Reaver}} will reduce all active shields before the triggering damage instance.
* {{sbc|Shield Reaver's}} debuff cannot be refreshed within its duration by subsequent damage dealt to the target.
* {{sbc|Shield Reaver}} will not trigger against damage blocked by {{tip|spell shield}}.
* Since {{ci|Fiora}} is immune to debuffs during {{ai|W|Fiora}}, she can have any current shield penetrated multiple times.{{bug}}
|strategy = 
|oldicons = 
|trivia = 
* The debuff is named ''Serpent's Venom''.
[[File:Bilgewater Crest icon.png|link=Bilgewater|100px|center]]
|quotes = 
|media = 
<gallery captionalign="center" orientation="square" spacing="small">
Serpents Fang melee debuff icon.png|50% Reduction icon
Serpents Fang ranged debuff icon.png|35% Reduction icon
</gallery>
|revisions = 
|patchhistory = 
;[[V26.13]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Fixed a bug where Shield Reaver damage applied Omnivamp.

;[[V14.4]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Now properly reduces shields on application if applied by an on-hit effect.

;[[V14.1]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2500}} from {{g|2600}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|525}} from {{g|625}}.

;[[V13.16]]
* Lethality increased to 15 from 12. 

;[[V12.12]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} No longer reduces shields by a greater factor than intended based on the enemies' heal and shield power.

;[[V11.17]]
* Lethality reduced to 12 from 18.

;[[V11.11]]
* Shield reduction for {{tip|ranged}} champions increased to 35% from 25%.

;[[V11.6]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Shield Reaver no longer applies to non-champions.

;[[V11.5#March 3rd Hotfix|V11.5]] - March 3rd Hotfix
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Fixed a bug where Shield Reaver passive would not be applied by ability damage.

;[[V11.5]]
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Shield Reaver:}}
** {{sbc|New Effect:}} Dealing damage to an enemy champion reduces any shields they gain within the next 3 seconds by {{rd|50%|25%}}, and if the target was not already afflicted by this effect, reduces all active shields on them by the same amount.
*** This does not affect magic damage shields.
** {{sbc|Old Effect:}} Basic attacks and abilities deal {{as|70 {{as|(+ 40% '''bonus''' AD)}} '''bonus''' physical damage|physical damage}} against {{tip|shield|shields}}. Does not affect magic damage shields.
** {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Fixed a bug where Shield Reaver would not reduce the target's current shields if the user owned an item with an on-hit effect.

;[[V11.2]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2600}} from {{g|2800}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|625}} from {{g|825}}.
* Attack damage reduced to 55 from 60.
* Description has been updated in the Collection tab.

;[[V10.24]]
* Shield Reaver base damage increased to 70 from 50.

;[[V10.23]] - Added
* {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{g|825}} = {{g|2800}}.
* {{sbc|Stats:}} 60 attack damage, 18 lethality.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Shield Reaver:}} Basic attacks and abilities deal {{as|50 {{as|(+ 40% '''bonus''' AD)}} '''bonus''' physical damage|physical damage}} against {{tip|shield|shields}}. Does not apply against magic damage shields.
* Limited to 1 '''Serpent's Fang'''.
}}
